feedback.text: Greetings, I would ask you all to kindly include video game preservation and safety in the digital fairness act. Both payment processors like Visa and Mastercard have a near monopoly and get to dictate which games can be bought and which can't. This is a horrible situation. It is not fair whatsoever. As such, I implore you to do the right thing and add paragraphs that forbid payment processors from doing such a thing, and to disallow video game publishers from deactivating video games without having given a reasonable way to emulate multiplayer or singleplayer after the video game's lifecycle has ended. The entire situation is atrocious.
